lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Orca ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Orca
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, passenger-cabin capacity, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Orca
sources.what: Saud Kruger lore, luxury-cabin role, and the ship's spec reference.
